name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account
notes: Edit this BB to include all events that indicate failed attempts to access the network using a disabled account.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (5753626) Disabled Account Blank Pwd, (5753627) Disabled Account User Pwd, (5769200) User_account_locked_out, (9500470) Windows Account Locked, (5754790) Failed_login-account_disabled, (5755917) Guessed Disabled Account Pwd, (5754792) Failed_login-account_locked_out, (5754795) Failed_login-not_authorized_for_console_login, (4253354) HOST:WIN:DIAL-IN-LOCKOUT, (4253427) HOST:WU-FTP:DISABLED-ACCOUNT, (5754798) Failed_login-time_restriction_violation, (5000013) Logon Failure - Account logon time restriction violation, (5000014) Logon Failure - Account currently disabled, (5000016) Logon Failure - User not allowed to logon at this computer, (5000017) Logon Failure - The user has not been granted the requested logon type at this machine, (5000094) User Account Locked Out, (4253320) HOST:WIN:530-FAILED-RESTRICTED, (4253321) HOST:WIN:531-ACCOUNT-DISABLED, (5000169) User account disabled, (26500002) IAS_ACCOUNT_DISABLED, (4253323) HOST:WIN:533-FAILED-NOT-ALLOWED, (26500004) IAS_ACCOUNT_LOCKED_OUT, (4253326) HOST:WIN:539-ACCOUNT-LOCKED, (26500008) IAS_DIALIN_DISABLED, (26500009) IAS_DIALIN_LOCKED_OUT, (5000248) A user account was locked out, (4253263) HOST:TACACS:REJECTED-USER, (4253264) HOST:TACACS:REJECTED-USER2, (5769198) User_account_disabled, (5001959) An account failed to log on: Account Disabled, (5001948) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: Account Disabled, (5001954) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: User Locked Out, (5001965) An account failed to log on: User Locked Out, (5001949) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: Account Expired, (5001960) An account failed to log on: Account Expired, (5001962) An account failed to log on: Logon Outside Normal Time, (5001951) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: Logon Outside Normal Time
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event QID is one of the following (5753626) Disabled Account Blank Pwd, (5753627) Disabled Account User Pwd, (5769200) User_account_locked_out, (9500470) Windows Account Locked, (5754790) Failed_login-account_disabled, (5755917) Guessed Disabled Account Pwd, (5754792) Failed_login-account_locked_out, (5754795) Failed_login-not_authorized_for_console_login, (4253354) HOST:WIN:DIAL-IN-LOCKOUT, (4253427) HOST:WU-FTP:DISABLED-ACCOUNT, (5754798) Failed_login-time_restriction_violation, (5000013) Logon Failure - Account logon time restriction violation, (5000014) Logon Failure - Account currently disabled, (5000016) Logon Failure - User not allowed to logon at this computer, (5000017) Logon Failure - The user has not been granted the requested logon type at this machine, (5000094) User Account Locked Out, (4253320) HOST:WIN:530-FAILED-RESTRICTED, (4253321) HOST:WIN:531-ACCOUNT-DISABLED, (5000169) User account disabled, (26500002) IAS_ACCOUNT_DISABLED, (4253323) HOST:WIN:533-FAILED-NOT-ALLOWED, (26500004) IAS_ACCOUNT_LOCKED_OUT, (4253326) HOST:WIN:539-ACCOUNT-LOCKED, (26500008) IAS_DIALIN_DISABLED, (26500009) IAS_DIALIN_LOCKED_OUT, (5000248) A user account was locked out, (4253263) HOST:TACACS:REJECTED-USER, (4253264) HOST:TACACS:REJECTED-USER2, (5769198) User_account_disabled, (5001959) An account failed to log on: Account Disabled, (5001948) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: Account Disabled, (5001954) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: User Locked Out, (5001965) An account failed to log on: User Locked Out, (5001949) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: Account Expired, (5001960) An account failed to log on: Account Expired, (5001962) An account failed to log on: Logon Outside Normal Time, (5001951) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on: Logon Outside Normal Time
